# CraftsmanOnDemand
> A portfolio-first marketplace connecting Dallas-Fort Worth homeowners with
> verified independent craftsmen for home repair and improvement.

## About
CraftsmanOnDemand connects consumers in the DFW Metroplex with verified
craftsmen. Homeowners post jobs and receive flat-price bids from craftsmen
who have passed identity verification and background checks. Every craftsman
profile includes a real portfolio of completed work — not just a star rating.

## How it works
1. Homeowner posts a job with photos and zip code — free, no account required
2. Verified craftsmen in the area bid with a flat project price
3. Bids are sorted: Verified first, then by rating, then by price
4. A $50 refundable destination fee is paid before an in-person visit
5. If the quote is accepted, work begins. If not, the fee is refunded.

## Services (live)
- Drywall repair
- Interior painting
- Furniture assembly
- General handyman
- Deck and fence repair
- Gutter cleaning
- TV mounting
- Light fixture installation

## Services (coming soon — licensed trades)
- Plumbing repair (requires Texas TDLR license)
- Electrical repair (requires Texas TDLR license)

## Service Area
Dallas-Fort Worth Metroplex, Texas — including Dallas, Fort Worth, Plano,
Frisco, Arlington, Irving, McKinney, Garland, Denton, Lewisville, Carrollton,
Grand Prairie, Mesquite, Richardson, and Allen.

## Contact
hello@craftsmanondemand.com
